source_pr.title: table/tables: make the test case more stable
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Make the test code more stable

Problem Summary:

I meet some strange error in the CI like that:

```
[domain:8028]Information schema is changed during the execution of the statement(for example, table definition may be updated by other DDL ran in parallel). If you see this error often, try increasing `tidb_max_delta_schema_count`. [try again later]
github.com/pingcap/errors.AddStack
	/media/genius/OS/project/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/errors@v0.11.5-0.20201029093017-5a7df2af2ac7/errors.go:174
github.com/pingcap/errors.Trace
	/media/genius/OS/project/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/errors@v0.11.5-0.202010290930175a7df2af2ac7/juju_adaptor.go:15
github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*DDLExec).toErr
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/
github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/ddl.go:65
github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*DDLExec).Next
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/ddl.go:134
github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.Next
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/executor.go:268
github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*ExecStmt).handleNoDelayExecutor
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/adapter.go:522
github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*ExecStmt).handleNoDelay
	/media
/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/adapter.go:404
github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*ExecStmt).Exec
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/adapter.go:354
github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.runStmt
	/media/
genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:1285
github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).ExecuteStmt
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:1229
github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).Execute
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:1145
github.com/pingcap/tidb/table/tables_test.(*testSuite).TestTypes
	/media/genius/OS/project/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/table/tables/tables_test.go:190
reflect.Value.call
	/media/genius/OS/project/go/src/reflect/value.go:475
reflect.Value.Call
	/media/genius/OS/project/go/src/reflect/value.go:336
github.com/pingcap/check.(*suiteRunner).forkTest.func1
	/media/genius/OS/project/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/check@v0.0.0-20200212061837-5e12011dc712/check.go:850
github.com/pingcap/check.(*suiteRunner).forkCall.func1
	/media/genius/OS/project/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/check@v0.0.0-20200212061837-5e12011dc712/check.go:739
runtime.goexit
	/media/genius/OS/project/go/src/runtime/asm_amd64.s:1374
```

It turned out that I create two tables with the same name ( "create table t")  that conflicts.
**But the error message should be "table already exist", instead of "infoschema change".**
That puzzles me a lot, so I continue to investigate, and finally locate the problem here.


### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

Use the ts future.

```
_, err := ts.se.Txn(true)
```

How it Works:

This code makes a direct call on session internal state, and discard the result, lead the session to an unclean state.
And cause some weird behavior in the following tests finally.


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: PR body: CI sometimes hits "Information schema is changed during the execution" error; make test code more stable
failure_signature: PR body: CI sometimes hits "Information schema is changed during the execution" error; make test code more stable
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: table/tables: make the test case more stable.
fix_pattern: table/tables: make the test case more stable

evidence: evidence: PR body: CI sometimes hits "Information schema is changed during the execution" error; make test code more stable
evidence: ensure txn exists before reading infoschema by calling `ts.se.Txn(true)` and asserting no error (table/tables/tables_test.go)
